title: llm.translate
description: Translate a {key: text} mapping between languages. Empty entries short-circuit to {status: 'ok', result: {}} without calling the provider. Returns {status: 'ok', result: {key: translated}} or {status: 'failure', reason: string}.

from_lang.description: Source language code, or 'auto' to auto-detect.

entries.description: Mapping of keys to source-language strings.
